mentions.note: Post-spin-off Honeywell Technologies is a pure-play automation company with secular growth in mission-critical verticals (data centers, hospitals, LNG). 2/3 of global LNG capacity, $1B+ backlog, and physical AI optionality. Long-cycle revenue, resilient to macro. Cramer's child trust holds a large position; seeks to increase.

Pure-play automation company post-aerospace spin-off; mission-critical markets (data centers, hotels, hospitals, LNG). 2/3 of global LNG supply, 3-year backlog, secular growth. Cramer's trust owns large position, wants bigger. Not expensive relative to growth path.
Aerospace spin-off completes June 30; aircraft business will be fantastic once Iran war ends; currently in breakup purgatory; post-breakup repricing likely; CEO Topalian credible execution.
Charitable Trust holding; industrial automation/aerospace split later this year; good numbers but stock historically sells off on earnings; consider selling before report.
Spinning off quantum business (Aquentium) later 2026; owns 54% stake, highly valuable asset for quantum exposure.
Spinning off quantum business Aquentium (54% owned) later this year; valuable asset.
Post-split play; Cramer and Jeff Marks bullish long-term but stock surged; wait for pullback after industrials cool; own into split but let it pull back first.
HALO trade (heavy asset low obsolescence) losing momentum; industrial company that benefits from data center buildout but not AI-proof as once thought.
Industrial benefiting from AI productivity narrative; huge gains recently but still not expensive historically vs. S&P 500; solid earnings and buyback story.
Stock almost always goes down on earnings despite Quantum spinoff hype. Splitting into pieces; some investors don't want each part. Likely down after report.
Aerospace and industrial diversification; finally getting credit for business transformation; strong performer.
Conglomerate undergoing breakup, beaten down in 2025 due to lack of AI/data-center momentum; Cramer sees green shoots but waiting for execution clarity.
